questions.question: When you're stressed, what do you most want to do?

options.text: Work up a sweat with intense exercise
Hang out and chat with friends
Take a walk in nature
Listen to music quietly alone
A new challenge or sports experience
Exciting outdoor activities and travel
Reading and drawing at a café
Watching movies at home, cozy and relaxed
The leader who drives the atmosphere
The energizer who leads gatherings
The peacemaker who mediates conflicts
The comforter who warmly empathizes

questions.question: When you need to make a decision, you:

options.text: Judge quickly and act immediately
Follow your intuition and choose the exciting option
Carefully analyze pros and cons before deciding
Listen sufficiently to the opinions of those around you

questions.question: Which travel style appeals to you most?

options.text: Extreme adventures like bungee jumping or surfing
Backpacking to experience new cultures
Visiting famous museums and cultural heritage sites
Relaxing at a healing resort
Passionate and driven
Bright and positive
Thoughtful and analytical
Creative and unique

questions.question: When you're angry, how do you react?

options.text: Speak up directly and resolve it immediately
Take a short break and cool down quickly
Quietly organize your thoughts alone
Suppress emotions inside and endure
Passionate and proactive expression
Building diverse experiences together
Deep intellectual connection and mutual understanding
Warm and thoughtful care and empathy
Actively approach first and start a conversation
Become friends quickly with bright energy
Slowly observe and get to know the other person
Listen to the other person's story first

questions.question: When it comes to your dreams and goals:

options.text: Set a goal and push forward strongly
Explore and enjoy various possibilities
Deeply explore and find philosophical meaning
Express uniquely using artistic sensibility

red.name: Red
red.title: Passionate Leader
red.description: You are a person overflowing with passion and energy. With strong will and drive you charge toward your goals without hesitation, inspiring and energizing those around you. Leadership comes naturally, and you are the type who confidently points the way in any situation.
strengths: Powerful drive and execution toward goals
Indomitable will that doesn't waver in any situation
Natural leadership that guides the team
Decisive judgment that shines in a crisis
weaknesses: Impatience can lead to mistakes
Tendency to overlook others' opinions
Excessive competitiveness can harm relationships
red.advice: Sometimes take a step back and listen to those around you. Your passion is your greatest weapon, but paired with warm consideration you become a true leader.

orange.name: Orange
orange.title: Energetic Adventurer
orange.description: You are an adventurer overflowing with energy who loves new things. You easily mingle with people and have the ability to brighten the atmosphere wherever you go. You're the type who energizes those around you with an open mind toward new experiences and positive energy.
strengths: Flexibility that adapts quickly in any environment
Outstanding sociability that makes friends easily
Positive attitude that enjoys new challenges
Energy that brightens even a dark atmosphere
weaknesses: Deep focus can be difficult
Tendency to make impulsive decisions
Difficulty staying in one place for long
orange.advice: Your bright energy lights up the world. Occasionally stop and savor deep relationships and goals. A tree with deep roots grows taller.

yellow.name: Yellow
yellow.title: Bright Optimist
yellow.description: You are like the sun that brightens the world. You find the positive side in any situation and bring vitality to those around you with creative ideas. You have a wonderful sense of humor and a natural talent for making people smile.
strengths: Ability to find positivity in any situation
Creative and unique ideas
A presence that brings laughter and vitality to people
Free thinking that breaks the mold
weaknesses: Concentration can be difficult in serious situations
Mood swings can occur
Tendency to lack detailed planning
yellow.advice: Your brightness is the most precious gift in the world. Sometimes sit down seriously and make a calm plan. When your creativity is paired with execution, infinite possibilities open up.

green.name: Green
green.title: Peaceful Harmonizer
green.description: You are a peaceful person who values balance and harmony. You are connected to nature and form deep bonds with the people around you. You have a natural ability to mediate conflicts and create an environment where everyone feels comfortable.
strengths: Deep empathy that understands everyone's perspective
Mediation ability that softly resolves conflict
Consistent and stable trustworthiness
Deep understanding of nature and life
weaknesses: Difficulty asserting your own opinion strongly
Can appear indecisive
Can get exhausted from absorbing too many emotions from others
green.advice: Your warm inclusivity makes the world more beautiful. Occasionally listen to your own emotions and desires too. You need to love yourself first to love others even better.

blue.name: Blue
blue.title: Calm Thinker
blue.description: You are a thinker with deep thought and analytical ability. You value reason over emotion and are trusted for your careful judgment. You have an outstanding ability to solve even complex problems logically with a calm attitude.
strengths: Cool-headed judgment not swayed by emotions
Ability to systematically solve complex problems
Loyalty that never betrays once trust is given
Inquisitiveness that builds deep knowledge and expertise
weaknesses: Poor emotional expression can make you appear cold
Stress from pursuing excessive perfection
Slower to adapt to new changes
blue.advice: Your logical thinking is an ability the world truly needs. Occasionally listen to your heart and practice expressing emotions. The harmony of reason and emotion will complete you even more.

indigo.name: Indigo
indigo.title: Intuitive Explorer
indigo.description: You are an intuitive explorer who explores deep inner worlds. You seek meaning beyond the surface, enjoy philosophical questions, and see through to the essence with sharp intuition. You possess a special insight that sees what others cannot.
strengths: Excellent intuition that sees the invisible
Philosophical thinking that explores the deep meaning of life
Ability to read complex patterns and connections
Sensitivity that detects even hidden emotions of others
weaknesses: Can fall into thoughts disconnected from reality
Can be lonely by forming deep relationships with only a few
Communication can be difficult when trapped in your own world
indigo.advice: Your deep insight is the light the world needs. Occasionally step out of deep contemplation and enjoy everyday pleasures. The beauty of the earthly world is also well worth exploring.

purple.name: Purple
purple.title: Mysterious Artist
purple.description: You are a mysterious artist in whom creativity and spirituality are combined. You view the world with a unique perspective and create beauty with artistic sensibility and imagination. You are a strongly individual and original being, a free spirit who refuses the ordinary.
strengths: Original and beautiful artistic expression
Free thinking unbounded by convention
Ability to create beauty with deep sensitivity
Inclusive perspective that respects individuality and diversity
weaknesses: Tendency to neglect practical matters
Easily feels isolated when not understood
Consistency can waver depending on mood
purple.advice: Your creativity is the power that makes the world more beautiful. Occasionally maintain a connection with reality and share your art with the world. Your unique color can inspire many people.

pink.name: Pink
pink.title: Warm Empath
pink.description: You are a master of empathy who wraps those around you with a warm heart. You respond sensitively to others' emotions and create a safe space where people can comfortably open their hearts. You are the type who builds precious relationships with delicate care and sincere love.
strengths: Delicate empathy that accurately reads others' emotions
Warm heart that treasures relationships
Friendliness that makes the atmosphere cozy
Ability to give strength through sincere comfort and encouragement
weaknesses: Sensitive emotions make you easily hurt
Tendency to sacrifice yourself too much for others
Can struggle with not being able to refuse
pink.advice: Your warmth is the most precious gift in the world. Don't forget to cherish and love yourself first. When you are happy, those around you can shine even brighter.
